nasb.text: Now it happened one day that he went into the house to do his work, and none of the men of the household was there inside.

esv.text: But one day, when he went into the house to do his work and none of the men of the house was there in the house,

cnv.text: 有一天，約瑟到屋裡辦事，家裡的人沒有一個在屋裡。

ccb.text: 一天，约瑟进屋里办事，那时屋里没有其他人。

csbs.text: 有一天，约瑟进屋去做事，没有一个家仆在屋里；
